markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the Turnstile content strategy and demo the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Revision:** Broaden topic clusters to 30–40 articles each (for 3–4 months of content) and target competitor keywords to steal traffic, not just avoid them.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize educational, foundational content over deep technical guides, which are harder for the team to execute.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Airtable Workflow:** Consolidate all keywords into one tab for efficiency. Use linked records to auto-populate data (e.g., search volume) in the `Assignments` tab.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**Client Presentation:** William will lead the strategy review, using the Content OS to show the data foundation (keywords, URLs) that informs the recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Feedback

  - [Aida provided feedback on the strategy doc to ensure a sustainable content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [**Topic Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Goal:** Broaden clusters to support 3–4 months of content.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Each cluster needs to contain 30–40 articles to maintain a consistent publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Keyword Targeting:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [**Action:** Target competitor keywords to steal traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current strategy of only targeting topics where competitors are absent is too limiting.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [**Execution Feasibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Focus:** Prioritize educational, foundational content.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Avoid:** Deep technical guides and dev tutorials, which are difficult for the team to produce.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Action:** Consult Sydney (Base 10, Rumpod) for a technical perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Airtable Content OS Workflow

  - [Aida demonstrated the Content OS setup, which streamlines content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**Unified Keyword Tab:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [**Change:** Consolidate all keywords (gap analysis, manual research) into a single `Keywords` tab.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The previous two-tab system was inefficient and created linking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Linked Records:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Function:** Link records between tabs (e.g., `Assignments` to `Keywords`) to auto-populate data.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Automatically pulls keyword data (volume, difficulty, intent) into the `Assignments` tab, ensuring accuracy and saving manual entry.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [**Client View:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Setup:** Group the `Assignments` tab by `Topic Cluster` for client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This view clearly organizes topics by strategic theme.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Client Presentation Plan

  - [William will lead the strategy review with the client, with Aida providing backup.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Presentation Flow:**](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Overview:** Present the revised topic clusters and keyword strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
    2.  **Data Foundation:** Use the Content OS to show the data that informs the strategy.
          - [**`Keywords` Tab:** Demonstrate the depth of research (e.g., 80k records).](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
          - [**`URLs` Tab:** Show competitor pages and their performance.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
          - [**`Assignments` Tab:** Preview the initial content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
    3.  [**Rationale:** Explain that the fast-paced process is designed to publish quickly and get performance signals faster.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

### Logistics & Availability

  - [**William:** OOO for two weeks over Christmas.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Kathy:** Available during the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Aida:** Confirmed content delivery is not at risk, as Natalie is qualified to manage it independently.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kathy:** Revise the strategy doc: broaden topic clusters, adjust keyword targeting, and consult Sydney.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [**Aida:** Finalize the Content OS setup for the client presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [**William:** Lead the client strategy presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/eK4CCNpkh9CcE3oTe4_bRxytWo5ohWAU?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
